An unknown male was the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic's]] [[Admiral of the Fleet/Legends|'''Admiral of the Fleet''']] during the [[Mandalorian Wars]]. He was based on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. Following the [[Battle of Serroco]], he made an official protest with the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] government over the positioning of the [[Republic Army]] near the [[Stereb cities]]. After the destruction of the ''[[Arkanian Legacy]]'' he welcomed [[Saul Karath]] back to Coruscant.
